---
title: "Day 4: Florence - David & Medici Sites"
subtitle: "Michelangelo & the Medici"
date: "2026-06-08"
day-of-week: "Monday"
location: "Florence"
categories: [itinerary, florence, museums, art]
---

## Overview

**Focus:** Michelangelo's David at the Accademia and Medici family sites

---

## Morning: Accademia Gallery (8:30-10 AM)

### Galleria dell'Accademia

**Booking:** Check timed entry - arrive 15 min early

**Highlights:**
- **David** ⭐ - The icon, 17 feet tall, perfection in marble
- Stand directly in front, walk around, take your time
- Unfinished *Prisoners* showing Michelangelo's process
- Musical instrument collection

**Time:** 1-1.5 hours (smaller than Uffizi)

**Tips:**
- Gets crowded by 10 AM - early entry best
- Photography allowed (no flash)
- Everyone here for David - don't miss the Prisoners too

---

## Late Morning: San Lorenzo Area (10:30 AM-12:30 PM)

### Medici Chapels

**Why:** Michelangelo's sculptural tombs for Medici family

**Highlights:**
- Tomb of Lorenzo de' Medici (*Dawn* and *Dusk*)
- Tomb of Giuliano de' Medici (*Day* and *Night*)
- Chapel of Princes (opulent marble)

**Time:** 45-60 minutes

### Basilica di San Lorenzo

**Medici family church**, next to chapels
- Brunelleschi architecture
- Laurentian Library (Michelangelo staircase) - if open

---

## Lunch: Mercato Centrale (12:30-2 PM)

**Food Market Heaven:**
- Upstairs: Food court (pasta, pizza, wine, cheese, truffles)
- Downstairs: Fresh produce market
- Cheap, delicious, authentic
- Eat lunch, browse market

---

## Afternoon: Free Time (2-6 PM)

**Options:**

**Museum (if energy):**
- Palazzo Vecchio (city hall, secret passages)
- Museum of San Marco (Fra Angelico frescoes)

**Shopping:**
- San Lorenzo leather market (stalls outside church)
- Artisan workshops
- Paper goods, perfumes

**Relaxation:**
- Boboli Gardens (save for tomorrow?)
- Café in piazza, people-watch
- Gelato tasting

**Explore:**
- Wander without agenda
- Get lost in side streets
- Discover your own favorite piazza

---

## Evening: Aperitivo & Dinner

**Aperitivo (6-8 PM):**
- Santo Spirito piazza (Oltrarno)
- Buy drink, get free appetizers
- Local scene

**Dinner (8-9:30 PM):**
- Try bistecca alla fiorentina tonight? (Huge T-bone steak, shared)
- Or save for tomorrow

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Accademia (David) timed entry
- [ ] Medici Chapels visit
- [ ] Mercato Centrale lunch
- [ ] Afternoon activity chosen
- [ ] Aperitivo experienced
- [ ] Dinner reservation (if needed)

---

**Previous:** [Day 3](day-03-2026-06-07-florence.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 5](day-05-2026-06-09-florence.qmd)
